description: Submitting the valid formFor sets signup.submitted true and forwards the collected values to the onsubmit server-fn (§41.14.3 + §55.7). After a valid fill and a form submit (serverStub persistSignup → "ok"), signup.submitted flips true and the compound cell holds the collected {name,email,agree}; the server-fn route is exercised via the impl-neutral serverStub keyed by the source fn name.
rationale: §41.14.3 the default submit invokes onsubmit=persistSignup(values); §55.7 submitted flips true on the first submit attempt. serverStub is keyed by the scrml-SOURCE fn name persistSignup (impl-neutral; the adapter maps it to the emitted __ri_route_persistSignup_N). The (b) contract is the resulting state (submitted + collected values), not the wire bytes.
